query: SELECT id, title, cdnUrl FROM media_catalogue WHERE (cdnUrl LIKE '%title-card%' OR cdnUrl LIKE '%poster%' OR cdnUrl LIKE '%thumbnail%' OR cdnUrl LIKE '%vid-ref%' OR cdnUrl LIKE '%icard-mode%' OR cdnUrl LIKE '%relay-spinner%' OR cdnUrl LIKE '%icard-relay%') AND cdnUrl LIKE '%.png' ORDER BY id LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2GX11Pnc2Gj5TH4.2b4c6ce847b1 --database EPdHLKrneifLpbtrLUugQB --execute SELECT id, title, cdnUrl FROM media_catalogue WHERE (cdnUrl LIKE '%title-card%' OR cdnUrl LIKE '%poster%' OR cdnUrl LIKE '%thumbnail%' OR cdnUrl LIKE '%vid-ref%' OR cdnUrl LIKE '%icard-mode%' OR cdnUrl LIKE '%relay-spinner%' OR cdnUrl LIKE '%icard-relay%') AND cdnUrl LIKE '%.png' ORDER BY id LIMIT 20;
